Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioners Villa Florence Hospitality, Inc. and JRK Property Holdings, Inc.'s petition to compel arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
